name: skillscope-codex
description: Launch SkillScope from Codex and capture sessions for skill coverage analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Open SkillScope for Codex skill coverage.
interface.longDescription: SkillScope Codex launches the browser viewer from Codex, packages Codex session traces, loaded SKILL.md files, task metadata, and result metadata into a SkillScope capture bundle, then runs coverage analysis.
defaultPrompt: Open SkillScope for this Codex session.
